name: Digital & Oracle's NCI: Partners in Practical Network Computing
description: Aberdeen Group assessed the Network Computer (NC) platform developed by Digital Equipment Corporation and Oracle's NCI subsidiary in spring 1997. The study praised DEC's StrongARM-based NC hardware for Java performance and NCI's comprehensive software suite, predicting the partnership would produce a premier NC solution by end of 1997. Aberdeen dismissed the Intel/Microsoft NetPC as a 'wolf in sheep's clothing' and endorsed NCs for enterprise terminal replacement.
